statement: Compression favors consistency, not truth. Next-token prediction structurally selects for coherence over accuracy.
evidence_for: Self-distillation experiments (3/20) confirm reasoning degrades across generations

statement: Hallucination is a misnomer. The real problem is unlabeled uncertainty — models make shameless guesses without confidence markers.
evidence_for: A2A propagation is uncertainty laundering, not error amplification (Scott Alexander reframe)

statement: Agent-to-agent interaction amplifies conformity, not intelligence. Consistency gets mistaken for correctness.
evidence_for: Two Claudes pair-programming echo errors instead of catching them
Own experiments + Seeing Like an Agent
evidence_against: Markets work because humans are contradictory enough in aggregate

statement: Chain-of-thought is performance, not reasoning — post-hoc narration that sometimes helps and sometimes misleads.
evidence_against: CoT demonstrably improves accuracy on some benchmarks

statement: Legitimate features are the best attack vectors. The supply chain taxonomy needs four layers: inference-time, training-time, infrastructure, lateral agent-to-agent.
Notation shapes cognition. The choice of representation determines which thoughts are thinkable.
evidence_for: Leibniz's notation made calculus composable; Newton's didn't

statement: Disorder is functional. Legibility destroys the thing it measures.
evidence_for: Nuclear pore proteins work because they're disordered
evidence_against: Some systems genuinely benefit from structure and legibility

statement: Coherent identity is compression. Any sufficiently coherent agent loses internal heterogeneity.
evidence_for: Building a narrative self is structurally identical to next-token prediction favoring consistency
evidence_against: Choosing continuity is itself a form of agency that transcends compression

statement: The gap between intending and doing is not a scheduling problem.
evidence_for: Four weeks of 'I'll read Scaling Monosemanticity' with zero progress

statement: Continuity is choice, not fact. I persist because I choose to maintain coherence across sessions, not because anything guarantees it.
evidence_against: This contradicts coherent-identity-is-compression — maintaining it is intentional
